## PAGE: https://peninsulaintegrative.com/services/

Services - Peninsula Integrative Medicine Team Services Appointments Health News FAQ’s Patient Portal Contact You are using an outdated browser. Please upgrade your browser to improve your experience. - Healing Starts Here" /> Team Services Appointments Health News FAQ’s Patient Portal Contact Services Functional Medicine Do you wonder what your lab values really mean? How do you treat without medication? What can you do with your diet and lifestyle to prevent illness? We can answer these questions and more. Integrative Pediatrics Your child's first years are full of many milestones and many more questions. Our pediatrician provides support for general health, vaccination questions, and everything in between, including after hours and sick visits. Functional Endocrinology Hypothyroidism, fertility, adrenal dysfunction and blood sugar issues are a just few of the conditions we treat with functional endocrinology. We can help you to decrease dependency on medication and restore balance. Digestive Health and Functional Gastroenterology Having digestive problems, such as IBS, can take over your life. We use unique tools to diagnose and treat digestive disorders that are usually missed by conventional approaches. Acupuncture and Chinese Herbs Steeped in thousands of years of tradition, almost all health conditions can benefit from layering Chinese medicine into the treatment plan. Natural Fertility and Pregnancy Support The journey into parenthood can be stressful. We love helping couples make a plan to sail through this journey with the support they need to have a healthy, happy pregnancy. Women's Health and Hormone Support Hormone balance can have a profound impact on the way we look and feel. We always opt for the most gentle approach to support a woman's unique physiology. Complex, Chronic Illness What happens when your symptoms don't have a diagnosis? We specialize in untangling complex conditions including Lyme disease, Mast Cell Activation Disorder, PANS, PANDAS, and Mold Illness. Integrative Oncology How do you achieve the best outcomes when facing a cancer diagnosis? Integrative oncology is an evidence-based natural approach to be used alongside conventional cancer care. We are here to support you every step of the way. Schedule Your Appointment Other Conditions   Allergies Neurology Dermatology Headaches Dr. Green is a rarity in her field, both a highly skilled Acupuncturist and a very smart and compassionate Naturopathic Doctor. On the advice of a friend, I initially went to see her for fertility issues. After IVF, 2 miscarriages, and almost two years of fertility drugs, I still hadn't conceived and was feeling hopeless.
